blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,273 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
